behavior_summary: Defines Korick NPC gameplay behavior: how he is described when examined, how he responds to theft and hostile actions, how he participates in shop/dialog interactions, and how schedule/area triggers move or update his behavior.
KORICK::look (main) makes Korick produce different short barks depending on life state and whether the player has previously met him (uses global korickMet).

When the player steals near Korick (AvatarStoleSomething) the script checks stolen item types and, if appropriate and guards haven't already been called, clears tracked references, shouts 'Stop! Thief!' and spawns guards.
Area-enter and area-leave handlers (enterFastArea / leaveFastArea) perform reference cleanup and either spawn schedule-related routines or teleport Korick randomly on exit.

A schedule routine computes and writes korickSchedule based on engine state and spawns external schedule handlers to apply behaviors. Cast (spell-targeted) logic may call for help or summon guards/sorcerer depending on target and randomness.
Shop/dialog helpers present choice lists to the player (armor and weapons), handle selection via Item::ask, and call engine money/transaction routines to perform purchases.
notable_control_flow: KORICK::look: check Npc::isDead -> if dead bark 'dead Korick' and exit; else read global korickMet -> bark either 'Korick the Smith' (if not met) or 'man' (if met).

U8P_KORICK::AvatarStoleSomething: read stolen item pointer ([BP-02h]); call Item::getType repeatedly to match item categories; read global guardsCalled to avoid duplicate summons; if conditions met, call resetRef on multiple ref slots, bark alert, and spawn CALGUARD::0080.

U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea: clear references (resetRef), read global korickSchedule and spawn either U8P_KORICK::16D8 when schedule==2 or U8P_KORICK::1051 when schedule==1 to run schedule-specific behaviors.

U8P_KORICK::schedule: if Npc::isDead then return; otherwise call FREE::28F9 to get a state, map it to a small schedule value, write korickSchedule, and spawn METHOD::133F (and also METHOD::143A) to apply/update schedule.

U8P_KORICK::cast: loop a small number of times; if no combat target call FREE::1C19 (request help); if targeted by player then probabilistically bark a plea ('Help me, Beren!' or 'Town Sorcerer!') and spawn CALGUARD::0080.
U8P_KORICK::leaveFastArea: free references via FREE::2A56; if Korick is alive, call urandom to generate coordinates and Npc::teleport to a random nearby location.
open_questions: Exact numeric item type codes checked by AvatarStoleSomething and which concrete item categories they represent (strings/types inferred but not canonical).
Precise mapping table used in schedule() between FREE::28F9 return values and the concrete korickSchedule numbers (only inferred mapping to small integers).
Exact behavior and code bodies of spawned internal routines U8P_KORICK::16D8 and U8P_KORICK::1051 referenced by enterFastArea (their names/roles inferred only from spawn targets).
Whether guardsCalled is written elsewhere in game code (script reads it to gate summons) and exactly where that write occurs.

main_function.name: U8P_KORICK::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player 'U8P_KORICK::look' (examine) interaction with the Korick NPC: if Korick is dead, make him bark a 'dead' message; otherwise choose a short identification bark depending on whether the player previously met Korick (korickMet).
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_KORICK::look) — invoked when the Avatar or another actor examines this NPC/process.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::look
function_map.role: Player examination handler; reports Korick's description and playing-state-dependent barks.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: Respond to nearby theft: check stolen item types, clear references, shout and summon guards (if guards not already called).

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger: reset stored references and spawn schedule-dependent internal handlers based on korickSchedule.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::schedule
function_map.role: Compute and set korickSchedule (read engine state via FREE::28F9), then spawn external schedule application routines (METHOD::143A / METHOD::133F).

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::cast
function_map.role: React to spell/target events: possibly call for help, bark pleas, and summon guards or town sorcerer depending on target and randomness.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit trigger: clear references and, if alive, teleport Korick to a random nearby location.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::0420
function_map.role: Armor shop/dialog entry: present armor choices and proceed to purchase/amount handling.

function_map.name: U8P_KORICK::09BF
function_map.role: Weapon shop/dialog entry: present melee weapon choices and execute purchase logic (prices, inventory, transactions).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a schedule-specific routine when korickSchedule == 2 (internal schedule behavior).
Spawn a schedule-specific routine when korickSchedule == 1 (internal schedule behavior).

external_calls.purpose: Check if Korick is dead to choose dead-vs-alive dialog path.
Make Korick produce the short identification or dead bark to the inspecting player/process.
Determine the stolen item's type/category to decide whether to summon guards/trigger theft response.
Clear NPC reference slots that tracked stolen items or related state prior to summoning guards.
Spawn or call guard routine in response to theft.
Obtain an engine state/value used to map to a korickSchedule number.
Spawn/notify an external method as part of schedule computation (used in schedule workflow).
Spawn external schedule-application method after korickSchedule is set.
Check current AI/combat target to decide help request or retaliatory behavior.
Request help/alert when Korick has no target (call for assistance).
Spawn guards in response to being targeted (especially if target is player).
Free/clear stored references on area exit.
Generate pseudorandom coordinates used before teleporting Korick on area exit.
Teleport Korick to a random new location when leaving the fast area (if alive).
Present multiple-choice dialog (armor choices) to player and receive selection.
Present weapon choices and manage the player's purchase selection/flow.
Call engine money/transaction check/transfer routines during purchase handling (inferred from dialog flow).

reads.name: korickMet
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Korick uses the long title ('Korick the Smith') or a generic description ('man') when examined.

reads.name: korickSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Read by enterFastArea to decide which schedule-specific internal routine to spawn; influences NPC daily/periodic behavior.

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: Gating flag consulted by AvatarStoleSomething to avoid re-calling guards multiple times for the same incident.

writes.name: korickSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Written by U8P_KORICK::schedule based on engine state so enterFastArea and schedule-application methods know which routine/state to run.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Defines Korick NPC gameplay behavior: how he is described when examined, how he responds to theft and hostile actions, how he participates in shop/dialog interactions, and how schedule/area triggers move or update his behavior.
